title: helopus meyerianus
side_effects: Helopus meyerianus can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and dizziness. Prolonged use or incorrect preparation of helopus meyerianus can also cause liver and kidney damage, as well as interact with certain medications. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can result in eye irritation and skin burns.
